name: gm/why-us
title: Developers — Why Us Section
description: Value proposition block with 3 benefit cards. Mirrors the Why Us section of Developers.tsx.

proposition.default: Gamer Minds combines professional game localization with a growing community of players interested in localized titles.

card1Desc.default: Native-speaking translators with gaming expertise, editing, and LQA services.

card2Desc.default: Access to a growing community of players actively interested in localized titles.

card3Desc.default: Your games are introduced to players who care about localization and want to experience them.
